product_name: Dragon Stars Series - Dragon Ball Super - Goku Ultra Instinct Sign vs Jiren 6.5" Battle Pack Action Figure Set

bullets: The most epic battles of Dragon Ball come to life in the Dragon Stars Battle Pack

Inspired by the most iconic and well known battles in the Dragon Ball universe, the Battle Pack includes all new accessories and features exclusive face details not available in the individual 6 inch Dragon Stars Figures
Features 20 plus points of articulation allowing for plenty of dynamic action-packed posing and playability
Re-create your favorite scenes, or make up new ones of your own The Battle Pack is perfect for the adult collector or kids who love the action of Dragon Ball
content.description: The most epic battles of Dragon Ball come to life in the Dragon Stars Battle Pack. Inspired by the most iconic and well known battles in the Dragon Ball universe, the Battle Pack includes all new accessories and features exclusive face details not available in the individual 6.5-inch Dragon Stars Figures.

attributes.whats_in_box: Goku Ultra Instinct Sign figure, Jiren figure, 2 sets of interchangeable hands, effect part
attributes.primary_color: Goku Ultra Instinct Sign vs Jiren

compliance.choking_hazard: Yes - Small Parts; Warning label on product packaging.
